indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of any desk or table at sitting height is the primary barrier to setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no seating available that would allow for ergonomic positioning while working on a laptop.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be ambient and does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work.

indicators.name: no dedicated layout
indicators.rationale: The space is open and lacks a dedicated area for focused work, making it unsuitable for solo computer work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is largely unsuitable for computer work (solo). The lack of a flat work surface, ergonomic seating, task lighting, and a dedicated layout makes it difficult to set up a productive workstation. The open layout and lack of dedicated space further contribute to its unsuitability for focused solo work.
